inputs.label: Rebar Diameter (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard rebar diameter in millimeters, used to auto‑calculate weight per meter if custom weight is not provided.

inputs.label: Length per Bar (m)
inputs.businessContext: Typical standard factory bar length before any laps or cuts.

inputs.label: Number of Bars
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of bars required for the project.

inputs.label: Lap Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Additional splicing length added per bar for overlap joints.

inputs.label: Wastage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage overage for cutting waste, bending loss and site damage.

inputs.label: Custom Weight per Meter (kg/m)
inputs.businessContext: Optional override for the theoretical weight; if 0 or blank, weight is calculated from diameter using the formula 0.006165 × d².
